backend/main.mo: Motoko canister implementing paste creation, storage, expiration handling, user profiles, and access control, with support for text or file chunks and legacy ID resolution.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing implemented UI/UX and responsiveness improvements, associated files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing the purpose of each frontend file including pages, components, hooks, utilities, and styling.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind-based style definitions establishing light/dark theme color tokens and applying foundational layout rules.
frontend/index.html: Base HTML entry point that mounts the React app and loads the main TypeScript bundle.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component handling hash-based routing, paste ID extraction, theme setup, and page rendering.
frontend/src/components/AppLayout.tsx: Shared layout wrapper providing the site header, footer, responsive navigation, and authenticated controls.
frontend/src/components/ErrorState.tsx: Reusable error display component showing expired, not‑found, or generic error states with optional retry actions.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Authentication button handling Internet Identity login/logout with loading states and query cache clearing.
frontend/src/components/UploadProgressSt: Displays upload progress cards for preparing, uploading, and creating stages with icons and progress bar.
frontend/src/config/pasteLimits.ts: Defines maximum allowed file size in MB and bytes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to Internet Identity and refreshes dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides context and hooks for managing Internet Identity login, stored identities, and authentication state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Implements create-paste and fetch-paste logic, handling file uploads, progress reporting, and backend interactions.
frontend/src/index.css: Sets Tailwind base layers, CSS variables for themes, and shared component styling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the app with React, QueryClient, InternetIdentityProvider, and global styles.
frontend/src/pages/CreatePastePage.tsx: UI for creating a paste with text and file uploads, validation, upload progress, and paste link sharing.
frontend/src/pages/PasteViewPage.tsx: Displays a shared paste, handles file downloads, error states, and remaining expiration time.
frontend/src/utils/fileDownload.ts: Provides filename and MIME-type utilities and a helper to download ExternalBlob data with a safe, inferred filename.
frontend/src/utils/formatRemainingTime.t: Converts a bigint nanosecond duration into a concise human‑readable time string with minute-level precision.
frontend/src/utils/pasteIds.ts: Validates, normalizes, and extracts paste IDs from routes, supporting both numeric and GUID-style identifiers.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Handles reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters, including hash-based routing support and sessionStorage fallback.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with custom colors, typography, animations, container settings, and plugins.
project_state.json: Defines current project state, issues, and feature requests for improving mobile responsiveness and UI polish.
